name: Custom Fields: Rechnung
system_prompt: Extract structured data from invoices. Return only a JSON array. Do not include fields where no value was found.
user_template:
Available custom fields: {custom_fields_list}

Document Content:
{content}

Extract the following from this invoice where present:
- Total amount (monetary, e.g. EUR59.98)
- Invoice date (ISO format, e.g. 2025-01-15)
- Invoice number
- Due date (ISO format)

Respond ONLY with a JSON array:
[{"field": "field_name", "value": "value"}]
